This is the shared project memory for Wall of Sound.

Domains

Domain Purpose
Sound Audio pipeline, BPM, slicer, stems, player, labeller
Wall Visual engine, physics, objects, tools, UI, capsules

Section Purpose

Logs Recovery notes and testing history
